title: Show HN: Crack – Turn your MacBook into a squeaky door
full_text:
Crack
 

Turn your MacBook into a squeaky door.
Every lid movement triggers a satisfying creak.
 Download for macOS
 

Requires macOS 13.0 or later · Apple Silicon
 

Free & open source
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

📐
 

Lid Angle Sensor
 

Reads the built-in AppleHID lid sensor at 60fps to detect the slightest movement.
 
 

 

🎵
 

Variable Pitch
 

Playback speed maps to lid velocity — slow creaks and fast snaps sound completely different.
 
 

 

🔊
 

7 Synthesized Sounds
 

Haunted door cracks, cat meows, alien whispers, whale songs, wind effects, and more. All generated in real-time.
 
 

 

🖥️
 

Menu Bar App
 

No dock icon, no windows. Just a tiny menu bar icon to toggle, adjust volume, and pick sounds.
 
 

 

⚡
 

Lightweight
 

Under 1 MB. Near-zero CPU usage. Built natively in Swift with AVAudioEngine.
 
 

 

🔓
 

Open Source
 

MIT licensed. Signed and notarized by Apple. No tracking, no telemetry, no nonsense.
